prose.en: Pre-launch penetration tests are carried out during the test phase of the cloud service in accordance with the penetration test framework (cf. OPS-22 additional criterion). The severity of identified vulnerabilities is assessed according to defined criteria and actions for timely remediation or mitigation are initiated.

guidance.en:
Tests should be used that contribute to the quality assurance of the software development as well as to the security of the cloud service.      

The errors and vulnerabilities identified in tests can be assessed, for example, according to the Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS).
